notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Isaac Paredes. Hao-Yu Lee to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones pops out to second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith reaches on a fielder's choice. Yainer Diaz to 2nd. Yainer Diaz advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Dillon Dingler. Raynel Delgado scores. Christian Walker to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido walks. Yainer Diaz to 3rd. Cam Smith to 2nd.
